description_long: This is a modern, rectangular house set on a spacious, fenced lot with a large green lawn, a swimming pool, and a driveway. The house features a flat roof, clean lines, and a minimalist aesthetic, with a mix of white and gray exterior walls. There are several large windows, a rooftop terrace, and a main entrance accessible from a paved path. The property includes a detached garage, a hot tub, and a row of coniferous trees providing privacy. Outdoor amenities such as lounge chairs and a car parked in the driveway enhance the residential feel. The landscaping is well-maintained, with a mix of grass, trees, and paved surfaces.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with large windows, a rooftop terrace, and a spacious yard featuring a pool, garage, and landscaped greenery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, swimming pool, hot tub, and landscaped yard with trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, parked car, detached garage, and the row of trees separating the pool area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the house, garage, and the long green lawn with a tree at the far end.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the pool, lounge chairs, and the open green space adjacent to the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple door, paved path, and minimal overhang, no porch or decorative columns.
